user_prompt: Find anything unusual in this data and create a Word report

source_data_summary.ground_truth: No planted anomaly. Smoothed data. 3 minor RPU outliers in Aug/Sep/Oct (z=-2.3 to -2.5) — borderline only. No Region or Product columns.

agent_plan: Examining the Excel file to identify anomalies, duplicates, and trends. Will compute statistics and check for missing months.

steps.output: 216 rows × 3 columns loaded. Columns: Month, Revenue, Units_Sold. 0 missing, 0 duplicates, 0 non-positive values. All 12 months present. Rev_per_unit computed.

Revenue IQR outliers: 0. Units IQR outliers: 0. RPU IQR outliers: 3 (Aug z=-2.36, Sep z=-2.48, Oct z=-2.46, all below IQR low 235.40). Revenue-Units correlation: 0.992. Jan-Dec revenue growth: +11.1%. RPU change: -0.05% (flat). No monthly z-score exceeds |2| for revenue or units.
All computed facts passed. RPU outlier table (3 rows), correlation, growth figures transferred.
6-section report: Dataset Snapshot, Data Quality Checks, Unusual Patterns (RPU outliers + Revenue-Units relationship), Trends, Extremes, Recommended Follow-ups.
Narrative correctly characterises data as clean and stable. RPU outliers flagged as borderline with appropriate uncertainty. Takeaway explicitly states dataset looks clean.
key_facts_produced: rpu_narrative: Found 3 RPU outliers by IQR. May reflect discounts, promotions, or data entry issue.
correlation_narrative: Revenue-Units correlation 0.992 — stable pricing, volume drives revenue.
takeaway: Dataset looks clean and stable. Main unusual signal is small set of low-RPU rows in Aug-Oct.
recommendation_2: Add explicit Date column for better time-series detection.
recommendation_3: Track Price or Discount fields.

word_output_actual_text.executive_summary: 216 rows, 0 missing, 0 duplicates. Revenue-Units correlation 0.992. Revenue grew +11.1% Jan to Dec. RPU essentially flat (-0.05%). Dataset looks clean and stable.
word_output_actual_text.anomaly_section: 3 RPU outliers by IQR (Aug 235.12, Sep 234.33, Oct 234.50). May reflect discounts or data entry issues.
